Guide

# Changelog

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on Keep a Changelog (opens new window) and this project adheres to Semantic Versioning (opens new window).

# v1.2.7 (opens new window) - 2022-10-10

# Commits

  • [meta] add auto-changelog 0ebf4eb (opens new window)
  • [actions] add reusable workflows e115b63 (opens new window)
  • [eslint] add eslint; rules to enable later are warnings f58745b (opens new window)
  • [Dev Deps] switch from covert to nyc ab03356 (opens new window)
  • [readme] rename and add badges 236f4a0 (opens new window)
  • [meta] create FUNDING.yml; add funding in package.json 783a49b (opens new window)
  • [meta] use npmignore to autogenerate an npmignore file f81ece6 (opens new window)
  • Only apps should have lockfiles 56cad44 (opens new window)
  • [Dev Deps] update covert, tape; remove unnecessary tap 49c5f9f (opens new window)
  • [Tests] add aud in posttest 228ae93 (opens new window)
  • [meta] add safe-publish-latest 01fc23f (opens new window)
  • [meta] update repo URLs 6b164c7 (opens new window)

# v1.2.6 (opens new window) - 2022-03-21

# Commits

  • test from prototype pollution PR bc8ecee (opens new window)
  • isConstructorOrProto adapted from PR c2b9819 (opens new window)
  • security notice for additional prototype pollution issue ef88b93 (opens new window)

# v1.2.5 (opens new window) - 2020-03-12

# v1.2.4 (opens new window) - 2020-03-11

# Commits

  • security notice 4cf1354 (opens new window)
  • additional test for constructor prototype pollution 1043d21 (opens new window)

# v1.2.3 (opens new window) - 2020-03-10

# Commits

  • more failing proto pollution tests 13c01a5 (opens new window)
  • even more aggressive checks for protocol pollution 38a4d1c (opens new window)

# v1.2.2 (opens new window) - 2020-03-10

# Commits

  • failing test for protocol pollution 0efed03 (opens new window)
  • cleanup 67d3722 (opens new window)
  • console.dir -> console.log 47acf72 (opens new window)
  • don't assign onto proto 63e7ed0 (opens new window)

# v1.2.1 (opens new window) - 2020-03-10

# Merged

  • move the opts['--'] example back where it belongs #63 (opens new window)

# Commits

  • add test 6be5dae (opens new window)
  • fix bad boolean regexp ac3fc79 (opens new window)

# v1.2.0 (opens new window) - 2015-08-24

# Commits

  • failing -k=v short test 63416b8 (opens new window)
  • kv short fix 6bbe145 (opens new window)
  • failing kv short test f72ab7f (opens new window)
  • fixed kv test f5a48c3 (opens new window)
  • enforce space between arg key and value 86b321a (opens new window)

# v1.1.3 (opens new window) - 2015-08-06

# Commits

  • add failing test - boolean alias array 0fa3c5b (opens new window)
  • fix boolean values with multiple aliases 9c0a6e7 (opens new window)

# v1.1.2 (opens new window) - 2015-07-22

# Commits

  • Convert boolean arguments to boolean values 8f3dc27 (opens new window)
  • use non-ancient npm, node 0.12 and iojs 61ed1d0 (opens new window)
  • an older npm for 0.8 25cf778 (opens new window)

# v1.1.1 (opens new window) - 2015-03-10

# Commits

  • check that they type of a value is a boolean, not just that it is currently set to a boolean 6863198 (opens new window)
  • upgrade tape, fix type issues from old tape version 806712d (opens new window)
  • test for setting a boolean to a null default 8c444fe (opens new window)
  • if the previous value was a boolean, without an default (or with an alias) don't make an array either e5f419a (opens new window)

# v1.1.0 (opens new window) - 2014-08-10

# Commits

  • add support for handling "unknown" options not registered with the parser. 6f3cc5d (opens new window)
  • reformat package.json 02ed371 (opens new window)
  • coverage script e5531ba (opens new window)
  • extra fn to get 100% coverage again a6972da (opens new window)

# v1.0.0 (opens new window) - 2014-08-10

# Commits

  • added stopEarly option 471c7e4 (opens new window)
  • fix list fef6ae7 (opens new window)

# v0.2.1 (opens new window) - 2020-03-12

# v0.2.0 (opens new window) - 2014-06-19

# Commits

  • support all-boolean mode 450a97f (opens new window)

# v0.1.0 (opens new window) - 2014-05-12

# Commits

  • Provide a mechanism to segregate -- arguments ce4a1e6 (opens new window)
  • documented argv['--'] 14db0e6 (opens new window)
  • Adding a test-case for notFlags segregation 715c1e3 (opens new window)

# v0.0.10 (opens new window) - 2014-05-11

# Commits

  • dedicated boolean test 46e448f (opens new window)
  • dedicated num test 9bf2d36 (opens new window)
  • aliased values treated as strings 1ab743b (opens new window)
  • cover the case of already numbers, at 100% coverage b2bb044 (opens new window)
  • another test for higher coverage 3662624 (opens new window)

# v0.0.9 (opens new window) - 2014-05-08

# Commits

  • Eliminate longest fn. 824f642 (opens new window)

# v0.0.8 (opens new window) - 2014-02-20

# Commits

  • return '' if flag is string and empty fa63ed4 (opens new window)
  • handle joined single letters 66c248f (opens new window)

# v0.0.7 (opens new window) - 2014-02-08

# Commits

  • another swap of .test for .match d1da408 (opens new window)

# v0.0.6 (opens new window) - 2014-02-08

# Commits

  • use .test() instead of .match() to not crash on non-string values in the arguments array 7e0d1ad (opens new window)

# v0.0.5 (opens new window) - 2013-09-18

# Commits

  • Improve '--' handling. b11822c (opens new window)

# v0.0.4 (opens new window) - 2013-09-17

# v0.0.3 (opens new window) - 2013-09-12

# Commits

  • failing test for single dash preceeding a double dash b465514 (opens new window)
  • fix for the dot test 6a095f1 (opens new window)

# v0.0.2 (opens new window) - 2013-08-28

# Commits

  • allow dotted aliases & defaults 321c33e (opens new window)
  • use a better version of ff e40f611 (opens new window)

# v0.0.1 (opens new window) - 2013-06-25

# Commits

  • remove trailing commas 6ff0fa0 (opens new window)

# v0.0.0 - 2013-06-25

# Commits

  • half of the parse test ported 3079326 (opens new window)
  • stripped down code and a passing test from optimist 7cced88 (opens new window)
  • ported parse tests completely over 9448754 (opens new window)
  • docs, package.json a5bf46a (opens new window)
  • move more short tests into short.js 503edb5 (opens new window)
  • default bool test was wrong, not the code 1b9f5db (opens new window)
  • passing long tests ripped out of parse.js 7972c4a (opens new window)
  • badges 84c0370 (opens new window)
  • all the tests now ported, some failures 64239ed (opens new window)
  • failing short test f8a5341 (opens new window)
  • fixed the numeric test 6b034f3 (opens new window)
